code: import React from'react';import{formatDay,formatTemp,getWeatherEmoji}from'../utils/weatherUtils';import'./ForecastRow.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ForecastRow=_ref=>{let{forecast,loading,unit}=_ref;if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card forecast-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-title",children:"5-Day Forecast"}),[...Array(5)].map((_,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"skeleton",style:{height:44,borderRadius:10,marginBottom:8}},i))]});if(!forecast||forecast.length===0)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card forecast-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-title",children:"\uD83D\uDCC5 5-Day Forecast"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"forecast-list",children:forecast.map((day,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"forecast-row",style:{animationDelay:`${i*0.06}s`},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"fc-day",children:formatDay(day.dt)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"fc-emoji",children:getWeatherEmoji(day.weatherCode)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"fc-desc",children:day.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"fc-range",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"fc-max",children:formatTemp(day.temp_max,unit)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"fc-sep",children:" / "}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"fc-min",children:formatTemp(day.temp_min,unit)})]})]},i))})]});};export default ForecastRow;
